assertions.title: Vector store file batch creation and listing preserve batch input shapes and pagination
assertions.observation: The passing test covers both shared file_ids and per-file files batch creation styles, then verifies list_files cursor/status query forwarding and typed page handling.

assertions.title: Vector store file batch polling helpers surface terminal batch state instead of hiding partial failure
assertions.observation: The passing polling-helper test shows repeated retrieve polling, explicit and server-driven poll intervals, poll-helper headers, and return of a cancelled terminal batch with visible terminal counts.

assertions.title: Vector store file batch upload helpers reject empty work, upload concurrently, and merge existing file ids
assertions.observation: The passing helper tests cover empty-work validation, concurrent uploads through /v1/files, merge of caller-supplied file_ids with uploaded ids, assistants-purpose file creation, and waiting for all upload workers before surfacing an error.

assertions.title: Batch creation preserves the input-file contract for asynchronous request execution
assertions.observation: The passing create-and-cancel test verifies /v1/batches request shaping for input_file_id, endpoint, completion_window, metadata, and output_expires_after, then parses the returned batch lifecycle resource.

assertions.title: Batch listing and cancellation preserve lifecycle visibility
assertions.observation: The passing batch tests verify cancel returns a transitional cancelling batch resource and list uses cursor pagination with stable next_after behavior.

assertions.title: Webhook unwrap verifies the raw body before parsing and yields typed event data
assertions.observation: The passing unwrap suite verifies signature-first raw-body handling, typed event parsing, env/default and explicit secret handling, custom tolerance, and distinct parse-vs-signature failures.

assertions.title: Webhook signature verification enforces secret, header, timestamp, and multi-signature rules
assertions.observation: The passing signature-verification suite covers client and explicit secrets, whsec decoding, required-header and missing-secret errors, invalid/stale/future timestamps with tolerance override, multi-value signature matching, and typed mismatch errors.

assertions.title: Vector Store File Batches Support Direct Retrieve and Cancel
assertions.observation: The passing lifecycle test verifies documented retrieve and cancel routes, local blank-id validation, and typed batch resources that preserve status and file-count fields across failed and cancelled states.

assertions.title: Batch Retrieval Exposes Current Lifecycle and Output File Identifiers
assertions.observation: The passing retrieve_lifecycle test verifies the direct retrieve route, blank-id validation, and typed batch parsing for status, request_counts, output_file_id, and error_file_id.

commands.observation: 4 tests passed, covering vector-store batch create/list/retrieve/cancel and upload_and_poll helper behaviors.
2 tests passed, covering batch create, cancel, retrieve, and list lifecycle contracts.
1 test passed, covering vector-store file-batch polling intervals, helper headers, and terminal cancelled-state visibility.
5 tests passed, covering webhook unwrap verification, parsing, secret sourcing, and tolerance behavior.
5 tests passed, covering webhook signature secret/header/timestamp validation, multi-signature matching, and typed mismatch errors.

frictions.description: The batches_contract_mock run briefly reported 'Blocking waiting for file lock on package cache' before proceeding.
frictions.resolution: Allowed cargo to wait; the test target completed successfully without reruns.

summary: Ran 5 required cargo test commands with the isolated batches_webhooks target dir; all 17 observed tests passed and all 9 assigned assertions (VAL-FILES-011 through VAL-FILES-019) are covered as passing.
